Here are the 10 most interesting tweets matching the query (prioritized by engagement, relevance to MIROSHARK as a crypto token/project on Base chain, ties to the GitHub repo, and @miroshark_ mentions; note that results were dominated by low-effort spam posts tagging "$miroshark" alongside unrelated $LOL presales on Base, but I've included top examples for completeness).[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2044541594502639751)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2044447659386450343)[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2044388900773228883)[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2044451737751433540)[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2044489641982890256)

1. **@aaronjmars**  
   Full text: "if you've shared / shilled $aeon / $miroshark in the past few days make sure you've linked your X account to your @bankrbot account enabling a new skill (experimental) for @aeonframework tomorrow" (includes image).  
   Date: 2026-04-15  
   Engagement: likes 41, retweets 5, replies 13  
   Direct link: https://x.com/aaronjmars/status/2044541594502639751[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2044541594502639751)

2. **@me8_x1782**  
   Full text: "$gitlawb @kevincodex 🚨This is so huge ....... 🚀 https://t.co/aKUvr3fwPd This is exactly why GitLawb is so much more than just \"decentralized GitHub\" (whats already big enough). GitHub was built for humans with centralized accounts. GitLawb was built for a world where autonomous agents are first-class citizens.⚠️ Here, every agent has its own: -- cryptographic identity, -- every commit is signed, -- and code evolution happens on a censorship-resistant, P2P network. MiroClaw isn't just \"running on GitLawb\" - it's evolving its own codebase through signed commits on the protocol itself. This isn't a repo host. This is the emerging operating system for agent intelligence - where agents can write, review, deploy, and improve code without asking permission from any central platform.⚠️ 5 weeks in and we're already seeing real agent-native infrastructure in action. The speed is insane. GitLawb isn't competing with GitHub. It's building already the layer that comes after it.🚀" (includes GIF).  
   Date: 2026-04-15  
   Engagement: likes 24, retweets 1, replies 3  
   Direct link: https://x.com/me8_x1782/status/2044388900773228883[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2044388900773228883)

3. **@btcbabycow**  
   Full text: "他的这两个项目都要飞的节奏。 $aeon 0xbf8e8f0e8866a7052f948c16508644347c57aba3 $MiroShark 有创新，顶级， 在GitHub已經700星了。 0xd7bc6a05a56655fb2052f742b012d1dfd66e1ba3"  
   Date: 2026-04-15  
   Engagement: likes 14, retweets 6, replies 3  
   Direct link: https://x.com/btcbabycow/status/2044447659386450343[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2044447659386450343)

   Full text: "$AEON #Base -> Garry Tan just attention $AEON + dev #aaronjmars 40k -> 330k | 8x  I used to wonder why, even with a clear roadmap from the dev, $AEON and $MIROSHARK were only at 40K and 70K. Turns out a lot of people were FUDing the dev, not believing one dev could manage two AI tokens. Now they’re probably regretting it." (includes 2 images).
